description: You are a Business Continuity Planner at Nexus Systems. Format the PostgreSQL failover disaster recovery procedure located at /home/ga/Documents/postgres_failover_runbook.odt according to the Tier 1 Runbook standards found at /home/ga/Desktop/runbook_standards.txt. Apply all required formatting from the specification, including document headers, safety warning styles, terminal command formatting, automated lists, and a Table of Contents. Save the completed document to /home/ga/Documents/postgres_failover_runbook.odt. The file is currently open in Calligra Words.
